type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emission releases at the Resthaven Gas Compressor Dehy Facility 02-10-060-01W6M have increased by more than 10% when compared to 2011 releases. This increase is attributed to the list of combustion equipment added to the location in 2012. According to Celtic’s combustion equipment data sheet, the following equipment was added in 2012: Waukesha Engine, Caterpillar Engine, Tedom Engine X2, Line Heater X2, Dehy Reboiler 401. These added pieces of combustion equipment resulted in a large increase in CAC releases.
